hero.title: Your Private Pool
hero.subtitle: Dive into a unique experience — swimming, relaxation and LED night ambiance in the heart of Île-de-France.

experience.title: A relaxation space just for you
experience.description: Enjoy a private pool in an intimate and welcoming setting. Whether it's an afternoon with friends, a family celebration or an LED night party, every moment is unforgettable.

features.privateDesc: No other guests — the space is entirely yours.
features.ledDesc: Immersive LED lighting for magical evenings.
features.musicDesc: Set the mood with your own playlist.
features.pingpongDesc: For the competitive ones among you.
features.hammockDesc: For those who prefer absolute relaxation.
features.switchDesc: Console available for gaming sessions with friends.
features.boardgamesDesc: Werewolf, Codenames, Mito and many more!

howItWorks.title: Book in 3 steps
howItWorks.step1Desc: Select your time slot and number of guests.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Come and enjoy your relaxation time!

location.title: How to get here
location.description: Ideally located in the Mont-Chalâts neighbourhood in Chelles, 3 minutes by car from the Lycée Gaston Bachelard and just 25 minutes from Paris via the RER E line. Up to 3 parking spots available on site.

contact.title: Ready to dive in?
contact.subtitle: Book a slot or place a takeaway order — quick reply guaranteed.

items.a: We offer 4 slots of 4 hours: Morning (10am–2pm), Afternoon (2pm–6pm), Evening (6pm–10pm) and Night (10pm–2am).
The pool comfortably accommodates 10 people, with a maximum of 15. Pricing varies by group size: up to 6, 7 to 10, or 11 to 15 people.
Bring your swimsuit and towels. Snacks and drinks are provided on site. Everything else is included: loungers, Bluetooth speaker, board games, Nintendo Switch, ping-pong table and hammock.

Snacks and drinks are included in every slot. As an add-on, two homemade kitchen formulas chosen by the group (everyone the same one), by chef's inspiration or on request: Sharing platters (mini-burgers, fricassés, bricks…) at €14/pers, or Traditional menu (starter + couscous, tajine, pizzas… + mint tea) at €19/pers. Order 48h in advance, minimum 6 people. Menu tailored to your preferences (allergies, choices…) — let us know when ordering.
We can provide up to 3 parking spots on site.
Contact us via WhatsApp or phone. A €10 deposit (via Wero, Revolut or PayPal) is required to confirm your booking. This amount will be deducted from the total on the day.
Free cancellation up to 24 hours before the slot. For late cancellations, if no one had booked your slot during your reservation, we'll refund the €10 anyway.
Yes, total privacy. No overlooking neighbours, nobody can see the pool. The space is perfect for moments with friends, family or women-only groups in complete serenity.

items.q: Can I host a ceremony or event?
items.a: Yes! Parties, family celebrations... we welcome all types of private events by the pool. Contact us via WhatsApp or message to discuss the details and plan your custom event.

Yes! Whether you're enjoying the pool and want to take home a platter, or simply ordering without a pool booking, we prepare on order mini sandwiches, mini burgers, fricassé sandwiches and many more. Contact us via WhatsApp or message to place your order and arrange the details.
No, alcohol is not permitted on the premises.
